---
title: "KDC AI 강의"
format: 
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
---

<style>
  body {
    background-color: #1F4E79;
    color: white;
    font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
  }
  .hero {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 2em 0;
  }
  .hero h1 {
    font-size: 3em;
    margin: 0.5em 0;
  }
  .hero h2 {
    margin: 0.5em 0;
  }
  .badge-row {
    margin: 1em 0;
  }
  .badge {
    display: inline-block;
    background-color: #fff;
    color: #1F4E79;
    padding: 0.5em 1em;
    margin: 0.5em;
    border-radius: 0.5em;
  }
  .section-title {
    margin-top: 2em;
    font-size: 2em;
  }
  .card-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
    gap: 1em;
    margin: 2em 0;
  }
  .card {
    background-color: #fff;
    color: #1F4E79;
    padding: 1em;
    border-radius: 0.5em;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .card h3 {
    margin: 0.5em 0;
  }
  .part-badge {
    padding: 0.2em 0.5em;
    border-radius: 0.3em;
    color: white;
  }
  .part-1 { background-color: blue; }
  .part-2 { background-color: green; }
  .part-3 { background-color: orange; }
  .part-4 { background-color: purple; }
  .part-5 { background-color: red; }
  .part-6 { background-color: teal; }
  table {
    width: 100%;
    margin-top: 1em;
    border-collapse: collapse;
  }
  th, td {
    padding: 0.5em;
    border: 1px solid #fff;
  }
  th {
    background-color: #333;
  }
</style>

<div class="hero">
  <h1>KDC AI 강의</h1>
  <h2>인공지능의 모든 것</h2>
  <div class="badge-row">
    <span class="badge">16강</span>
    <span class="badge">8.5시간</span>
    <span class="badge">Claude Pro 제공</span>
    <span class="badge">디스플레이 특화</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="section-title">강의 철학</div>
<ul>
  <li>AI 마인드셋 🌟</li>
  <li>실전 중심 학습 📚</li>
  <li>최신 기술 습득 🚀</li>
  <li>창의적 문제 해결 🎨</li>
</ul>

<div class="section-title">커리큘럼</div>
<table>
  <tr>
    <th>PART 1 <span class="part-badge part-1">블루</span></th>
    <td><a href="lecture_01.html">1강 AI 마인드셋+Claude Pro</a></td>
    <td><a href="lecture_02.html">2강 GitHub+Claude Code</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>PART 2 <span class="part-badge part-2">그린</span></th>
    <td><a href="lecture_03.html">3강 Claude Code Skills</a></td>
    <td><a href="lecture_04.html">4강 Claude Agent+CLI-Anything</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>PART 3 <span class="part-badge part-3">오렌지</span></th>
    <td><a href="lecture_05.html">5강 Python Streamlit</a></td>
    <td><a href="lecture_06.html">6강 R Shiny</a></td>
    <td><a href="lecture_07.html">7강 Quarto</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>PART 4 <span class="part-badge part-4">퍼플</span></th>
    <td><a href="lecture_08.html">8강 Gemini API</a></td>
    <td><a href="lecture_09.html">9강 AI 시뮬레이션</a></td>
    <td><a href="lecture_10.html">10강 배포심화</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>PART 5 <span class="part-badge part-5">레드</span></th>
    <td><a href="lecture_11.html">11강 배포10종</a></td>
    <td><a href="lecture_12.html">12강 보안&CI/CD</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>PART 6 <span class="part-badge part-6">틸</span></th>
    <td><a href="lecture_13.html">13강 텔레그램봇+Claude</a></td>
    <td><a href="lecture_14.html">14강 Gemini봇+알람</a></td>
    <td><a href="lecture_15.html">15강 종합실습60분</a></td>
    <td><a href="lecture_16.html">16강 AI트렌드&수료</a></td>
  </tr>
</table>

<div class="section-title">프로젝트 3종</div>
<div class="card-grid">
  <div class="card">
    <h3>프로젝트 1</h3>
    <p>상급 프로젝트</p>
  </div>
  <div class="card">
    <h3>프로젝트 2</h3>
    <p>중급 프로젝트</p>
  </div>
  <div class="card">
    <h3>프로젝트 3</h3>
    <p>하급 프로젝트</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="section-title">준비물</div>
<ul>
  <li>개인 노트북 💻</li>
  <li>인터넷 연결 🌐</li>
  <li>열정과 호기심 ❤️</li>
</ul>
